arts.sum: Another stellar weekend of LaLiga action will be headlined by Barcelona's trip to unbeaten Villarreal and Joe Champion has score predictions for that contest and all the other tussles in the Spanish top flight.

arts.ttl: Preview: Osasuna vs. Las Palmas - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's La Liga clash between Osasuna and Las Palmas, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
